title: The Shoe-Tying.
content:
Anthea bade me tie her shoe;
    I did; and kissed the instep too:
    And would have kissed unto her knee,
    Had not her blush rebuked me.
meaning:
"The Shoe-Tying." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
